text.value:
/*DELETE t
FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
INNER JOIN dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecording bp ON t.behaviorPlanDataId = bp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );*/


DECLARE @BatchSize INT = 50000;
DECLARE @DeletedRows INT = 1;

WHILE @DeletedRows > 0
BEGIN
    ;WITH ToDelete AS (
        SELECT TOP (@BatchSize) t.Id
        FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
        INNER JOIN dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecording bp ON t.behaviorPlanDataId = bp.id
        INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
        /**WHERE 
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )**/
    )
    DELETE t
    FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
    INNER JOIN ToDelete td ON t.Id = td.Id;

    SET @DeletedRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

    IF @DeletedRows < @BatchSize
        BREAK;
END
